name: Exclude archived tasks from User UI
changes: Defines archived tasks as excluded from daily User UI task surfaces
Filters task records with status matching 封存 or Archived before building the User UI model
Prevents stale archived tasks from appearing in all-task lists, project task lists, task status filters, counts, and generated task detail pages
verification: Archived task exclusion verifier passes for each regenerated project
Generated User UI contains no archived task row status data attributes
dataBoundary: Does not delete archived Notion tasks
Does not copy task records into AMCore
Only changes shared generator behavior and generated project-local HTML output
dataIsolation: Each project regenerates User UI from its own Notion task data source. Archived task records remain in the same project-local task database and are not copied into AMCore or another project.
definitionOfDone: AMCore User UI rules document states that archived tasks are excluded from task surfaces
Shared generator filters archived task statuses before rendering task lists or pages
SevenAM and HOZO AM generators are updated from AMCore
SevenAM and HOZO AM User UI HTML files are regenerated after clearing stale user-ui HTML outputs
Archived task exclusion verifier passes for SevenAM and HOZO AM
rollback: Restore previous project-local User UI generator and regenerate User UI.
